holdings.infoBox: INDA is an equity ETF with a total of 172 individual holdings. The top holdings are HDFC Bank stock at 6.38%, Reliance Industries at 6.20%, ICICI Bank at 5.39%, Bharti Airtel at 3.93%, and Infosys at 2.70%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI India ETF (INDA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI India index, a market-cap-weighted index of the top 85% of firms in the Indian securities market. INDA was launched on Feb 2, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
